title: Where to Practice CSS Grid: The Interactive Guide
description: Stop reading documentation and start building grids. Here are the best interactive Scrimba courses to practice CSS Grid.

title: Where to Practice CSS Flexbox: The Interactive Guide
description: Master alignment and layout. These interactive courses force you to write Flexbox code until it clicks.

title: Where to Practice JavaScript Arrays (Map, Filter, Reduce)
description: Array methods are the bread and butter of React. Practice map, filter, and reduce with these interactive challenges.

title: Where to Practice React Hooks (useState, useEffect)
description: Hooks can be confusing until you build with them. These courses give you hands-on practice with state and effects.

title: Where to Practice API Calls (Fetch & Async/Await)
description: Learn how to fetch data from real APIs. These courses have you build apps that consume live data.
